channel.title: IBD LitMonitor - AI & Machine Learning
channel.description: IBD literature monitoring: AI & Machine Learning

item.title: Priorities for advancing artificial intelligence in inflammatory bowel disease: a technology update.
item.description: Gastrointestinal endoscopy - Review - Artificial intelligence (AI), encompassing various methods that enable computers to process complex data and perform tasks previously requiring human input, is set to play a pivotal role in the fut...

item.title: INTELCAPE: A Deep Learning-Powered System for Automated, High-Accuracy Crohn's Disease Diagnosis via Capsule Endoscopy.
item.description: Clinical gastroenterology and hepatology : the official clinical practice journal of the American Gastroenterological Association - Capsule endoscopy (CE) is a non-invasive technique for diagnosing Crohn's disease (CD); however, manual interpretation of CE videos is time-consuming and error-prone. We developed an artificial int...

item.title: A lactylation modification-related prediction model for the diagnosis of ulcerative colitis based on machine learning.
item.description: Frontiers in immunology - Lactylation modification serves as a critical link between metabolic reprogramming and epigenetic regulation, playing a significant role in the progression of both malignant tumors and inflammatory...
